summary: Comprehensive testing of landing page and authentication system. All 9 backend API tests passed. All 13 frontend UI tests passed. Landing page displays all required elements (hero, features, pricing). Auth flow (register/login/logout) works correctly with session cookies.
passed_tests: BACKEND - POST /api/auth/register creates new user account with session cookie
BACKEND - POST /api/auth/register with duplicate email returns 400
BACKEND - POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials returns user data and sets session cookie
BACKEND - POST /api/auth/login with invalid credentials returns 401
BACKEND - POST /api/auth/login with non-existent user returns 401
BACKEND - GET /api/auth/me with valid session cookie returns user data
BACKEND - GET /api/auth/me without session returns 401
BACKEND - POST /api/auth/logout clears session and returns success
BACKEND - Full auth flow: register -> logout -> login -> me -> logout works correctly
FRONTEND - Landing page loads with data-testid='landing-page'
FRONTEND - Hero section displays 'SCAN. FLIP. PROFIT.' headline
FRONTEND - Nav bar has Sign In button (data-testid='nav-login-btn')
FRONTEND - Features section has 6 feature cards (data-testid='feature-0' through 'feature-5')
FRONTEND - Pricing section has ROOKIE and HALL OF FAME plans
FRONTEND - Pricing shows Free and $9.99/mo pricing
FRONTEND - 'Start Free' button navigates to auth page
FRONTEND - Auth page has Google login button (data-testid='google-login-btn')
FRONTEND - Auth page has email/password form with submit button
FRONTEND - Auth toggle switches between sign in/sign up modes
FRONTEND - Register mode shows name input field
FRONTEND - Back button returns to landing page
FRONTEND - Login with valid credentials shows Dashboard with user info in sidebar
FRONTEND - Dashboard sidebar shows user name and email (test@flipslab.com)
FRONTEND - Sign Out button logs user out and returns to landing page
critical_code_review_comments: Authentication endpoints correctly use bcrypt for password hashing
Session tokens are properly stored in httpOnly cookies with secure and samesite settings
Auth flow correctly handles Google OAuth via Emergent Auth external redirect
Landing page has proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
Dashboard correctly displays user info from session and handles logout

test_credentials.notes: Multiple test users were created during testing with unique emails

seed_data_creation: Test users created with unique UUIDs during pytest runs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing page and auth system fully tested. Key data-testid values: landing-page, nav-login-btn, hero-cta-btn, feature-0 through feature-5, pricing-rookie, pricing-hall-of-fame, pricing-cta-0, pricing-cta-1, auth-page, google-login-btn, auth-email-input, auth-password-input, auth-name-input, auth-submit-btn, auth-toggle-mode, auth-back-btn, nav-dashboard, logout-btn. Auth endpoints: POST /api/auth/register, POST /api/auth/login, GET /api/auth/me, POST /api/auth/logout. Session stored in httpOnly cookie named 'session_token'.

features_verified.landing_hero_section: PASS - Shows 'SCAN. FLIP. PROFIT.' headline with card graphics
features_verified.landing_features_section: PASS - 6 feature cards displayed with icons and descriptions
features_verified.landing_pricing_section: PASS - ROOKIE (Free) and HALL OF FAME ($9.99/mo) plans visible
features_verified.landing_nav_signin: PASS - Sign In button in nav bar works
features_verified.auth_page_google_button: PASS - Google OAuth button exists (redirects to Emergent Auth)
features_verified.auth_page_email_form: PASS - Email/password inputs with submit button
features_verified.auth_page_mode_toggle: PASS - Can switch between sign in and sign up modes
features_verified.auth_register_api: PASS - Creates user, sets session cookie, returns user data
features_verified.auth_login_api: PASS - Validates credentials, sets session cookie, returns user data
features_verified.auth_me_api: PASS - Returns authenticated user data with valid session
features_verified.auth_logout_api: PASS - Clears session and returns success
features_verified.dashboard_user_display: PASS - Shows user name and email in sidebar after login
features_verified.dashboard_signout: PASS - Sign Out button returns to landing page

console_warnings: Recharts chart sizing warning (non-critical) - appears on Dashboard when charts haven't fully rendered
